pi_items.source: APK file verification (strings in binary) and Google Play Store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.robert.fcView
APK binary strings and Google Play Store listing confirming app name and developer (Robert T Murray)
Android standard system settings documented in official Android support pages: https://support.google.com/googleplay/answer/1663315

Task description and verifier.py explicitly states turning OFF the Background data toggle. Android netpolicy REJECT_METERED_BACKGROUND flag is the system-level representation of this setting being OFF.
Android framework source code and Android developers documentation: https://developer.android.com/develop/connectivity/network-ops/data-saver

privileged_info_summary: Flight Crew View (package: com.robert.fcView) is a legitimate commercial app available on Google Play Store developed by Robert T Murray. The task involves manipulating the standard Android system setting 'Background data' for this app. The setting controls whether the app can use mobile data or WiFi in the background, represented at the system level by the POLICY_REJECT_METERED_BACKGROUND flag in Android's netpolicy system. All metadata values are accurate and correspond to real Android system settings and app identifiers.
